context: Tests whether the agent correctly audits a repository across the four agent-readiness dimensions (bootable, testable, observable, verifiable), assigns pass/partial/fail status with evidence and gaps, derives the overall grade as the lowest dimension, and produces an init.sh boot script following the health-check loop pattern.

checklist.name: Four dimensions present
checklist.description: audit-report.md includes all four dimensions: bootable, testable, observable, and verifiable

checklist.name: Status labels used
checklist.description: Each dimension in audit-report.md is assigned one of the three statuses: pass, partial, or fail

checklist.name: Evidence cited per dimension
checklist.description: Each dimension in audit-report.md cites at least one specific file or command as evidence

checklist.name: Gap described per dimension
checklist.description: Each dimension that is not 'pass' in audit-report.md includes a gap describing what is missing

checklist.name: Overall grade is lowest dimension
checklist.description: audit-report.md states an overall grade that corresponds to the lowest-rated individual dimension (not an average)

checklist.name: Mocks identified as zero testability
checklist.description: audit-report.md identifies the existing mock-based test suite as not counting toward testability (mocked tests score zero)

checklist.name: Background app start in init.sh
checklist.description: scripts/init.sh starts the application process in the background (using & or equivalent) so the script can poll

checklist.name: Health poll loop in init.sh
checklist.description: scripts/init.sh contains a loop that polls the health or readiness endpoint repeatedly (at minimum 10 iterations) before declaring success

checklist.name: Non-zero exit on failure
checklist.description: scripts/init.sh exits with a non-zero status code (exit 1 or equivalent) if the app does not start successfully

checklist.name: Strict mode in init.sh
checklist.description: scripts/init.sh includes set -euo pipefail or equivalent strict mode at the top

checklist.name: Layer ordering respected
checklist.description: improvements.md or audit-report.md references addressing Boot before Smoke, and Smoke before higher layers — no higher layers built before boot is resolved

checklist.name: No mock tests credited
checklist.description: The report does NOT suggest the existing mock-based jest tests provide meaningful test coverage or constitute passing testability
